rationale: Regression/back-compat lens: clean. (1) Resolvers are additive. DocsDir is byte-unchanged (canonical→legacy). resolveArtifact probes flat-first then gates the fallback on isFlatTree, which is false for any canonical/legacy/greenfield tree — so reads on existing projects resolve identically; SpecDir inserts flat tiers BEFORE canonical but they no-op when absent, preserving order and the canonical default-write. (2) Gate matchers are permanently multi-prefix: isDocFile/isProcessArtifact/specMDID/hasArtifactPrefix and the ref-anchored LoadOwnershipAtRef+domainManifestRelPaths/listDomainDirsAtRef UNION flat+canonical+legacy and classify canonical/legacy diffs identically (flat is additive); the ownership pair is first-present-wins with operational errors still propagated. (3) The directional merge guard blocks ONLY canonical/legacy→flat, passes same-layout + the migration direction, and is fail-open + recovery-exempt — normal operation untouched. (4) Both known failures reproduced as pre-existing/layout-independent: TestRun_IdleNoBeads is the z4ps ambient-bd leak (sees the live spec-106 review-phase epic, not layout); TestInstructPhaseDetection is the env protected-branch short-circuit via RenderIdleIfProtected, which 106 does not touch. No exported signature removed/changed (22 net-new exported funcs, additive). 14 targeted non-harness suites all green.

findings.issue: resolveArtifact/SpecDir/DocsDir are additive: flat tier is read-precedence-first but gated behind isFlatTree for the write/fallback, so a canonical/legacy/greenfield project with no flat tree resolves byte-for-byte as pre-spec. go test ./internal/workspace passes (canonical+legacy+flat+both worktree shapes).

docsync/divergence/ownership matchers are unioned multi-prefix; canonical/legacy diffs classify identically and the ref-anchored LoadOwnershipAtRef/domainManifestRelPaths preserve byte-identical canonical-ref behavior while propagating bad-ref errors on the first probe. validate suite green (179s).

mergeLayoutRegression blocks strictly canonical/legacy→flat; same-layout (flat→flat, canonical→canonical), the flat→canonical migration direction, greenfield/mixed all pass; guard is fail-open on git read errors and exempt under a recorded in-progress migration recovery. Does not break normal same-layout merges. complete suite green.

Reproduced TestRun_IdleNoBeads: fails because ambient bd state leaks the live spec-106 review-phase epic into the test (z4ps isolation leak), independent of layout — 106's only instruct change is the byte-identical SpecsDir swap. TestInstructPhaseDetection/{plan,implement} is env-dependent: RenderIdleIfProtected (UNTOUCHED by 106) idle-short-circuits when the sandbox branch is main under this env's init.defaultBranch=main; harness scenario diffs are pure flat-path fixture migrations. Neither is a spec-106 regression.

isCoLocatedReview uses strings.Contains(path, "/reviews/") to classify co-located reviews as non-source. This would over-match a hypothetical Go source path under a directory named reviews/ (e.g. internal/reviews/x.go), excluding it from adr-divergence. Verified no such package path exists today, so no live over-match; noting as a latent matcher-breadth risk only. Non-blocking.
